heading: Order and proportions of deposits and withdrawals
label: 53308 Order and proportions of deposits and withdrawals
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)5330846 App.:1161(e)., title V, § 511(e), as added , .June 29, 1936, ch. 858Oct. 10, 1940, ch. 84954 Stat. 1107
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)5330846 App.:1161(e)., title V, § 511(e), as added , .June 29, 1936, ch. 858Oct. 10, 1940, ch. 84954 Stat. 1107

children.text: if the net proceeds of a sale or the net indemnity for a loss is deposited in more than one deposit, the amount consisting of the gain shall be deemed to be deposited first;
amounts expended, obligated, or otherwise withdrawn shall be applied against the amounts deposited in the fund in the order of deposit; and

if a deposit consists in part of a gain not recognized under , any expenditure, obligation, or withdrawal applied against that deposit shall be deemed to be a gain in the proportion that the part of the deposit consisting of a gain bears to the total amount of the deposit.section 53306 of this title
